collection.title: Sunrise Over the Valley
collection.description: Golden hour light cascading through morning mist above the highland valley, captured during the first expedition.

collection.title: Deep Forest Path
collection.description: A narrow trail disappearing into ancient woodland, where century-old trees form a cathedral of bark and leaf.

collection.title: Storm Over the Sea
collection.description: Dramatic cloudscape building above open water, electric tension visible in the churning waves below.

collection.title: Desert Dunes at Dusk
collection.description: Wind-sculpted sand formations glow amber and rose as the sun descends, erasing all footprints from the day.
